namespace.label: Workplane
namespace.info: Create a new CadQuery workplane for sketching and solid operations.

namespace.label: Assembly
namespace.info: Create an assembly for multi-part models, constraints, and export.

namespace.label: Sketch
namespace.info: Build 2D sketch geometry for later extrusion or placement.

namespace.label: Plane
namespace.info: Reference named or custom planes for workplanes and transforms.

namespace.label: Location
namespace.info: Represent object placement and transformation in space.

namespace.label: Color
namespace.info: Define colors for assemblies and exported metadata.

namespace.label: selectors
namespace.info: Access selector helpers for faces, edges, vertices, and topology filters.

namespace.label: exporters
namespace.info: Export CAD data to STL, STEP, SVG, and other formats.

selectors.label: >X
selectors.info: Select geometry with a positive X direction.

selectors.label: >Y
selectors.info: Select geometry with a positive Y direction.

selectors.label: >Z
selectors.info: Select geometry with a positive Z direction.

selectors.label: <X
selectors.info: Select geometry with a negative X direction.

selectors.label: <Y
selectors.info: Select geometry with a negative Y direction.

selectors.label: <Z
selectors.info: Select geometry with a negative Z direction.

selectors.label: |X
selectors.info: Select geometry parallel to the X axis.

selectors.label: |Y
selectors.info: Select geometry parallel to the Y axis.

selectors.label: |Z
selectors.info: Select geometry parallel to the Z axis.

selectors.label: #X
selectors.info: Select geometry orthogonal to the X axis.

selectors.label: #Y
selectors.info: Select geometry orthogonal to the Y axis.

selectors.label: #Z
selectors.info: Select geometry orthogonal to the Z axis.

selectors.label: %Plane
selectors.info: Select planar geometry.

selectors.label: %Circle
selectors.info: Select circular edges.

selectors.label: %Line
selectors.info: Select linear edges.

selectors.label: %BSpline
selectors.info: Select spline-based geometry.

selectors.label: +X
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in +X.

selectors.label: -X
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in -X.

selectors.label: +Y
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in +Y.

selectors.label: -Y
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in -Y.

selectors.label: +Z
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in +Z.

selectors.label: -Z
selectors.info: Select the furthest geometry in -Z.

parameters.label: centered=
parameters.info: Control whether primitives are centered on each axis.

parameters.label: combine=
parameters.info: Control whether a new shape unions, cuts, or stays separate.

parameters.label: clean=
parameters.info: Clean resulting solids to remove extra splitter edges.

parameters.label: radius=
parameters.info: Set the radius for circles, spheres, and fillets.

parameters.label: diameter=
parameters.info: Set the diameter for holes and circular features.

parameters.label: depth=
parameters.info: Set the depth of cuts, holes, or shells.

parameters.label: height=
parameters.info: Set the height of extrusions and primitives.

parameters.label: length=
parameters.info: Set the length of slots, boxes, and other features.

parameters.label: width=
parameters.info: Set the width of boxes, rectangles, and slots.

parameters.label: angle=
parameters.info: Set polar, revolve, or slot rotation angles.

parameters.label: offset=
parameters.info: Set a workplane or transform offset distance.

parameters.label: selector=
parameters.info: Pass a CadQuery selector string or selector object.

parameters.label: tag=
parameters.info: Reference or reuse tagged geometry and workplanes.

workplaneSummaries.add: Add geometry to the current stack or chain.
workplaneSummaries.box: Create a box solid from length, width, and height.
workplaneSummaries.cboreHole: Cut a counterbored hole on the selected faces.
workplaneSummaries.center: Shift the local sketch origin before drawing.
workplaneSummaries.circle: Create a circle sketch on the current workplane.
workplaneSummaries.cskHole: Cut a countersunk hole on the selected faces.
workplaneSummaries.cut: Subtract another shape from the current solid.
workplaneSummaries.cylinder: Create a cylinder solid at each active point.
workplaneSummaries.edges: Select edges using selector strings or selector objects.
workplaneSummaries.extrude: Extrude pending wires into a solid.
workplaneSummaries.faces: Select faces using selector strings or selector objects.
workplaneSummaries.fillet: Round the currently selected edges with a radius.
workplaneSummaries.hole: Cut a simple hole on the selected faces.
workplaneSummaries.intersect: Keep only the overlapping volume with another solid.
workplaneSummaries.lineTo: Draw a line from the current point to a target point.
workplaneSummaries.loft: Loft between pending wires or profiles.
workplaneSummaries.mirror: Mirror geometry across a plane or face.
workplaneSummaries.moveTo: Move the sketch cursor without drawing.
workplaneSummaries.polygon: Create a polygon sketch from side count and diameter.
workplaneSummaries.pushPoints: Push an array of points onto the stack for patterned features.
workplaneSummaries.rect: Create a rectangle sketch on the current workplane.
workplaneSummaries.revolve: Revolve pending wires around an axis to form a solid.
workplaneSummaries.rotate: Rotate the current stack around an axis.
workplaneSummaries.shell: Shell the solid by removing selected faces.
workplaneSummaries.sphere: Create a sphere solid at each active point.
workplaneSummaries.sweep: Sweep a profile along a path to form a solid.
workplaneSummaries.tag: Tag geometry or workplanes for later reuse.
workplaneSummaries.translate: Translate the current stack by a vector.
workplaneSummaries.union: Union another solid into the current result.
workplaneSummaries.vertices: Select vertices using selector strings or selector objects.
workplaneSummaries.workplane: Create a new workplane relative to the selected face.

assemblySummaries.add: Add a part or subassembly to the current assembly.
assemblySummaries.constrain: Define an assembly constraint between parts.
assemblySummaries.export: Export the assembly to STEP, STL, or other supported formats.
assemblySummaries.shapes: List the underlying shape objects in the assembly.
assemblySummaries.toCompound: Convert the full assembly tree into a compound shape.
assemblySummaries.traverse: Iterate through child assemblies and parts.
